title: RC Animations
description: Fresh Animations addon for Rotten Creatures.
body:
This pack makes RC(Rotten Creatures) mobs to work with FA.
This pack requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
along with [FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and [RC](https://modrinth.com/mod/rottencreatures).
This pack only adds support for some mobs for now.

Supported mobs:

- **Burned**

- **Frostbitten**

- **Immortal**

- **Mummy**

- **Skeleton Lackey**

- **Swampy**

- **Undead Miner**

- **Zap**

- **Zombie Lackey**

Currently Unsupported mobs:

- **Glacial Hunter**

- **Scarab**

- **Dead Beard**
